@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+# amplifier-frontend-ent
+
+Minimal Python scaffold for an Ent JSON-RPC agent server backed by Amplifier.
+
+## Local dev
+
+```bash
+python -m venv .venv
+source .venv/bin/activate
+pip install -e .
+
+amplifier-frontend-ent --help
+```

@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+[build-system]
+requires = ["setuptools>=69", "wheel"]
+build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"
+
+[project]
+name = "amplifier-frontend-ent"
+version = "0.0.0"
+description = "Minimal scaffold for an Ent JSON-RPC agent server backed by Amplifier"
+readme = "README.md"
+requires-python = ">=3.11"
+license = { text = "MIT" }
+authors = [{ name = "Obra" }]
+
+# No implementation yet; keep runtime dependencies empty.
+dependencies = []
+
+[project.scripts]
+amplifier-frontend-ent = "amplifier_frontend_ent.cli:main"
+
+[tool.setuptools]
+package-dir = {"" = "src"}
+
+[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
+where = ["src"]

@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+"""CLI entrypoint for amplifier-frontend-ent.
+
+This is intentionally a minimal scaffold. The actual Ent JSON-RPC agent server
+implementation will be added later.
+"""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import argparse
+import sys
+
+
+def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
+    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(prog="amplifier-frontend-ent")
+
+    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest="command", required=True)
+
+    serve = subparsers.add_parser("serve", help="Start the (future) JSON-RPC server")
+    serve.add_argument("--host", default="127.0.0.1", help="Bind host")
+    serve.add_argument("--port", default=9000, type=int, help="Bind port")
+
+    return parser
+
+
+def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:
+    args = build_parser().parse_args(argv)
+
+    if args.command == "serve":
+        print(
+            f"Not implemented yet. Planned JSON-RPC server would bind to {args.host}:{args.port}.",
+            file=sys.stderr,
+        )
+        return 1
+
+    return 1
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    raise SystemExit(main())
